title: Admin UI: tournament providers CRUD
description: Create admin pages for managing CourtHive tournament providers. A provider is simply a name and abbreviation (e.g. 'St Ann's Tennis Club' / 'STANN', 'Parks League Cup' / 'PLC'). The UI should be simple: a list page showing all providers, and an add/edit form. Each provider row should show the abbreviation and a link to manage its tournaments.
acceptance_criteria: Each provider row shows name, abbreviation, tournament count, and edit/delete actions
Add provider form at /admin/league/tournaments/providers/new with name and abbreviation fields
Delete provider with confirmation (blocked if provider has tournaments)
Providers page linked from the admin sidebar/navigation
Routes protected by admin auth middleware

approach: 3. Provider list page: query all providers with tournament counts
4. Provider form: simple name + abbreviation fields
5. Delete guard: check if provider has any tournaments before allowing delete
6. Add navigation link to admin sidebar

testing_requirements: Can create a new provider with name and abbreviation
Cannot create provider with duplicate abbreviation
Can edit provider name and abbreviation
Cannot delete provider that has tournaments

context.user_story: As an admin, I need to register CourtHive providers so I can sync and manage tournaments from each one
